title: Bon Clay Mimics the Crew
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on bon clay mimics the crew, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Bon Clay Mimics the Crew. Sanji battles Mr. 2 Bon Clay, whose mimicry turns the fight into a test of recognition and trust. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: So to summarize, that okama's a master of disputes.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He can pose as any one of us at any time and threaten Vivi's life.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: So if you ever doubt another crew member's real identity...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Have them show the mark concealed under these bandages.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Unwrapp

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If they can't do that, then we'll know they're an impostor.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Huh, a 2-step identification system... That's almost too clever for someone like you to come up with...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Does that mean the Okama's already posing as you...?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll turn you into minced meat, you little punk!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Oh, it's Zero alright.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whew, that's our Zero.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Carue!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You don't need to push your- self!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You're already too injured to run!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: You won't escape from Meeeeeeeeeeeeeeee!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: @uarck!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hold on WUUP!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm gonna eat you dead meats right up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Carue, Noooo! We'll be cornered if we try to head up the stairs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just let me off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll fight him!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What-

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No, you're gonna crash into the walls!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: this can't be...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Quamaack!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: How could a mere duck run up the walls of allu- barna..!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Qua...

summary: This part develops bon clay mimics the crew and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
